zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Southwell於大約1502年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可武德利辛時，他的父親Francis Southwell28歲，母親Dorothy Tendering26歲。他於大約1525年與Thomasine Darcy在英國艾可丹波瑞結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1564年1月11日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆維蒙達哈姆 艾比享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特梅雷沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Southwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Southwell was born about 1502, in Woodrising, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Francis Southwell, was 28 and his mother, Dorothy Tendering, was 26. He married Thomasine Darcy about 1525, in Danbury, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 11 January 1564, in Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Mereworth, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Southwellが約1502年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウッドリシングで生まれた時，父Francis Southwellは28歳，母Dorothy Tenderingは26歳であった。約1525年にイギリスエセックスダンブリーでThomasine Darcyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1564年1月11日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウイモンドハムウイモンドハム アビーで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントメレウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Southwell(이)가 대략 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 우드리징에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis Southwell(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Tendering(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1525년 영국 에세스 단아버이에서 Thomasine Darcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1564년 1월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 윈이몽함 윈이몽함 애브브이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 머워스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Southwell родился около 1502 г. в местности вудрисинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Francis Southwell было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Tendering, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasine Darcy около 1525 г. в местности данбури, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 11 января 1564 г. в местности вимондхам эбби, вимондхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности мирюорт, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
